title: Pan-Seared Stuffed Tofu with Spring Onions
description: A flavorful and healthy dish featuring crispy tofu stuffed with savory goodness, served with caramelized spring onions.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Cut the tofu into 1-inch cubes and press them gently to remove excess moisture.
Add the chopped spring onion to the skillet and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the tofu cubes to the skillet and cook until golden brown on all sides, about 5-6 minutes.
While the tofu cooks, prepare the stuffing mix according to package instructions.
Once the tofu is done, add the stuffing mix to the skillet and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the stuffed tofu hot, garnished with additional spring onion if desired.
